summary: Both packets scaffolded valid TypeScript contract files (typecheck ✅, lint ✅, schema_surface ✅) but import_smoke fails due to double-nested path bug in the verification harness (importing './src/contracts/X' from a file already at src/contracts/X.ts). This is the same root cause identified in Round 1. The deliverables appear correct; the verification harness path construction needs correction at the system level before retry can succeed.
blocking_questions: Should the import_smoke verification path be corrected to use './mission_types' (or './artifact_types') instead of './src/contracts/X'?
Should the scope tracking for fresh-acpx-002 realized_files be reconciled with the confirmed manifest path?
